findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: The signature block is duplicated: the handwritten signature image (which includes 'Sincerely,', the signature, and 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer') is rendered alongside separate HTML text versions of the same content ('Sincerely,', 'David Miller, PE', 'State Mining Engineer'). This creates a reading-order disruption with duplicated content.
findings.evidence: PDF shows one instance of 'Sincerely,' followed by the signature and typed name/title. HTML shows 'Sincerely,' as text, then an image containing 'Sincerely,' plus signature plus name/title, then again 'David Miller, PE' and 'State Mining Engineer' as separate text lines.
